reasoning: After reviewing all available evidence through May 25, 2025, the probability of James Comey being arrested before July 1, 2025 is very low (8%). The investigation appears to have stalled after the initial interview on May 16-17 with no significant developments in over a week. Legal experts overwhelmingly agree the case lacks merit as protected political speech, and the ambiguous nature of the post makes proving intent nearly impossible. The quick arrest timeline in similar clear threat cases (4-5 days) contrasts sharply with the 10+ day delay here, suggesting weak evidence. While Trump administration has targeted opponents, the legal barriers and high-profile nature of Comey make rapid arrest unlikely within the remaining 36 days.
